heading: Model intermodal transportation plans
label: 5504 Model intermodal transportation plans
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)550449:301 (note)., , .Dec. 18, 1991Pub. L. 102–240, § 5003105 Stat. 2159
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)550449:301 (note)., , .Dec. 18, 1991Pub. L. 102–240, § 5003105 Stat. 2159

children.heading: .—Grants
children.label: a .—Grants
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall make grants to States to develop model State intermodal transportation plans that are consistent with the policy set forth in . The model plans shall include systems for collecting data related to intermodal transportation.section 302(e) of this title

children.heading: .—Distribution
children.label: b .—Distribution
children.text: The Secretary shall award grants to States under this section that represent a variety of geographic regions and transportation needs, patterns, and modes.

children.heading: .—Plan Submission
children.label: c .—Plan Submission
children.text: As a condition to a State receiving a grant under this section, the Secretary shall require that the State provide assurances that the State will submit to the Secretary a State intermodal transportation plan not later than 18 months after the date of receipt of the grant.

children.heading: .—Grant Amounts
children.label: d .—Grant Amounts
children.text: The Secretary shall reserve, from amounts deducted under , $3,000,000 to make grants under this section. The total amount that a State may receive in grants under this section may not be more than $500,000.section 104(a) of title 23
